analyst_note: CSRD/ESRS Sustainability Statement. Strong throughout — SBTi-validated Net-Zero-Standard targets, explicit 2019/2022 baselines, KPMG limited assurance, disclosed climate capex. One MED (limited assurance level).

specificity.quote: reaching net zero by 2050 ... aligned with the Corporate Net-Zero Standard of the Science Based [Targets initiative]
specificity.value: net zero by 2050, SBTi Net-Zero Standard
specificity.reasoning: Specific net-zero commitment aligned to the SBTi Corporate Net-Zero Standard.

metric.quote: emissions by at least 80% by [2030] ... by 25% by 2030 and by 90% by [2050]
metric.reasoning: Quantified near- and long-term reduction percentages.

baseline.quote: 79 percent in our scope 1 and 2 GHG emissions compared to 2019
baseline.reasoning: Explicit base years — 2019 for Scope 1+2, 2022 for Scope 3.

target.quote: Our emissions reduction targets have been validated by the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi)
target.reasoning: Targets validated by the SBTi and confirmed against its Net-Zero Standard.

time_horizon.reasoning: Near-term 2030 targets present alongside the 2050 endpoint.

scope.quote: emissions from our own operations (scope 1 and 2) as well as indirect emissions from our value chain (scope 3)

verification.quote: limited assurance regarding the statutory sustainability statement
verification.reasoning: Externally assured by KPMG, but a limited assurance level.

consistency.quote: In 2025, we allocated $11.8 million in capital expenditure (CapEx) to climate [action]
consistency.reasoning: Climate capex disclosed and a Climate Transition Plan documented; consistent with stated commitments.
